title: Snow Pea Pods with Pepper Cheese
ingredients: ½ lb Boursin pepper cheese, softened
instructions:
Remove the stem end of the peas, remove the string and blanche them in a large pot of boiling water for 30 seconds. Plunge them immediately into cool water to stop the cooking and preserve the green color.
With a sharp knife, slit open the straight seam of each snow pea and add the cheese.
